hero.badge: AI ad variant engine for e-commerce
hero.title_part1: Your product footage becomes ads ready to test
hero.subtitle: Edith helps e-commerce and dropshipping brands turn raw video into multiple short variants with hooks, captions, cuts, zooms and marketing angles.

brief.title: Natural brief
brief.detail: Describe the product, tone, target or style. Edith turns the brief into an actionable edit plan.

upload.title: Direct upload
upload.detail: Footage goes to Supabase Storage. Vercel stays light and never touches heavy rendering.

captions.title: Ad captions
captions.detail: Short, readable subtitles placed to hold attention on mobile.

cuts.title: Cuts and pacing
cuts.detail: Fast structure, fewer silences, sharper hooks and simple transitions.

formats.title: Social formats
formats.detail: 9:16, 1:1 or 16:9 for TikTok Ads, Reels Ads, Shorts and Facebook Ads.

angles.title: Marketing angles
angles.detail: Problem-solution, benefit, proof, product demo or customer objection.

render.title: Modal rendering
render.detail: FFmpeg and faster-whisper run inside Modal, not in the browser or on Vercel.

exports.title: Exports ready
exports.detail: Every variant returns to the dashboard with status, preview and download.

outcomes.title: A creative testing machine, not a generic video editor.

test_faster.title: To test faster
test_faster.detail: Turn a single rush into several creative hypotheses without opening a timeline.

sell_clearer.title: To sell more clearly
sell_clearer.detail: Each variant highlights one angle: benefit, proof, objection or demo.

stay_control.title: To stay in control
stay_control.detail: You keep the preset, format, language, variant count and the brief.

demo.preview_hook: This little product solves a real problem

workflow.title: No complex timeline.
workflow.subtitle: Edith keeps Vercel light: app, auth, projects and webhooks. Heavy rendering goes to Modal.

presets.title: Three modes, enough to launch your first tests.

ugc_dynamic.title: Dynamic UGC
ugc_dynamic.detail: Facecam, testimonial, fast pacing, strong hook and readable captions.

ecommerce_ad.title: E-commerce ad
ecommerce_ad.detail: Product callouts, zooms, benefits, vertical format and simple outro.

product_demo.title: Product demo
product_demo.detail: Clean steps, product focus, explanatory text and crisp cuts.

architecture.title: An architecture built to scale.
architecture.detail: Supabase handles auth, storage and data. Modal handles video rendering. Stripe can be plugged in without blocking the MVP. The service role stays server-side only.

faq.title: The right questions before you launch.

capcut.a: No. Edith is not trying to become a full manual editor. The MVP focuses on generating ad variants ready to test.

vercel_render.a: No. Vercel serves the app and lightweight APIs. Heavy FFmpeg/transcription tasks go to Modal.

ugc.q: Can I use my own UGC videos?
ugc.a: Yes. Uploads support product footage, UGC, demos, testimonials, packshots or COD/dropshipping video.

stripe.a: Not for testing. Billing can stay disabled, then credits and subscriptions will be connected gradually.

cta.label: / First campaign
cta.title: Turn your next product rush into testable variants.
cta.detail: Start in mock mode, plug Modal next, then add Stripe once the first renders are ready.

billing.title: Billing
billing.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

pricing.title: Plans and credits
pricing.subtitle: Pick the plan that matches your creative testing volume.
pricing.dev_banner: Test mode — Stripe disabled. Sign up to explore the app.

free.name: Free
free.description: To test the workflow. Edith watermark, 30 s max video.

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: To get started. Dynamic captions, hooks, e-commerce presets.

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: For active e-commerce sellers. AI voiceover, no watermark, light editing.

agency.name: Agency
agency.description: Full advanced mode, timeline, brand kit, render priority.

contact.title: Let's talk about your creative ads pipeline.
contact.subtitle: Question about Edith, Modal, Supabase, credits or the e-commerce workflow? Send a message and keep your product context handy.
contact.direct_detail: For the MVP, the form opens your email client.

form.message_placeholder: Describe your need: video volume, formats, product types, presets...

partnership.title: E-commerce partnership
partnership.detail: Be specific about your need and your store context for a more useful reply.

support.title: Technical support
support.detail: Describe the error, when it happened, the browser and source file if possible.

billing.title: Billing question
billing.detail: Mention your plan, user ID and the relevant invoice.

terms.title: Service terms.
terms.subtitle: Working document for the Edith MVP. It must be legally reviewed before commercial production.

object.title: Purpose
object.detail: Edith is a SaaS for generating video ad variants for e-commerce and dropshipping.

account.title: User account
account.detail: The user is responsible for the security of their account, files and instructions sent.

content.title: Submitted content
content.detail: The user must hold the necessary rights to the videos, music, voices, texts, brands and assets provided.

renders.title: Renders
renders.detail: Renders may vary based on source file quality, preset, instructions and connected external services.

credits.title: Credits and payment
credits.detail: The credits/Stripe logic is prepared for the MVP and will need to be finalized before real billing.

limits.title: Limits
limits.detail: Vercel performs no heavy video rendering. FFmpeg/transcription work is reserved for the Modal worker.

privacy.title: Privacy and data.
privacy.subtitle: Working document for the Edith MVP. It must be reviewed and adapted by a professional before commercial use.

data_collected.title: Data collected
data_collected.detail: Edith may process account information, projects, uploaded video files, render instructions and technical metadata required for the service.

usage.title: Usage
usage.detail: This data is used to authenticate the user, store assets, trigger renders, display statuses and improve the product workflow.

storage.title: Storage
storage.detail: Source videos and exports are stored in Supabase Storage. Heavy render tasks are planned on Modal.

secrets.title: Secrets
secrets.detail: Service role, Modal and Stripe keys must never be exposed in the browser. They stay in server environments.

retention.title: Retention
retention.detail: Retention duration will be specified for commercial production. The MVP keeps data necessary for account operation.

editor.title: Editor
editor.detail: Edith - legal information to be completed before commercial launch.

hosting.title: Hosting
hosting.detail: Application hosted on Vercel. Data and files on Supabase. Heavy jobs on Modal.

ip.title: Intellectual property
ip.detail: Brands, interfaces, texts and contents of the service are reserved unless otherwise noted.

status.title: MVP status
status.detail: This page is a structured placeholder for the MVP and must be legally completed.

login.side_title: Come back to your campaigns, variants and exports.
login.side_subtitle: Sign in to create a project, upload product footage, and track Modal renders from the dashboard.
login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Access your Edith projects and launch your next ad variants.

forgot_password.side_title: Take back control of your account.
forgot_password.side_subtitle: Enter the email tied to your Edith workspace. You'll get a secure link to reset your password.
forgot_password.title: Forgot password
forgot_password.subtitle: Tell us your email and we'll send a reset link.
forgot_password.success: If an account exists, an email with instructions has just been sent.

reset_password.side_subtitle: Use at least 8 characters. Avoid passwords already reused on other services.
reset_password.title: Reset password
reset_password.subtitle: Set a new password for your Edith workspace.

errors.callback_failed: The sign-in link could not be verified. Request a new link.
errors.missing_code: Invalid or expired link. Start the sign-in flow again.

register.title: Create an account
register.subtitle: Prepare your first pipeline: upload, preset, brief, variants.
register.success: Account created. Check your inbox if email confirmation is enabled.
register.side_title: A dashboard to produce ad variants, not to tinker with a timeline.

perks.presets: UGC, e-commerce and product demo presets
perks.credits: Credits and Stripe ready to plug in

social.title: Sign in or join now!
social.subtitle: Log in or create your Edith account.
social.email_helper: Enter your email address to sign in or create an account
social.terms_prefix: By clicking continue, you agree to our
social.testimonial: This platform has helped me to save time and serve my clients faster than ever before.

dashboard.title: Creative testing room
dashboard.subtitle: Steer your product footage, track Modal renders, and grab TikTok/Reels variants ready to test.
dashboard.auth_notice: Sign in to use Supabase Auth, Storage and Postgres. Mock mode is only available for local testing.
dashboard.empty_subtitle: Start with a UGC video or a product demo. Edith will create project rows, variants and the job in the database.

empty_state.title: Create your first ads project
empty_state.subtitle: Upload product footage, pick your preset and let Edith generate the variants ready to test on TikTok, Reels and Facebook Ads.

dashboard.credits_detail: 1 short variant = 5 credits. If `BILLING_DISABLED=true`, Edith lets the render through to test the pipeline.

settings.title: Edith settings
settings.subtitle: Control the state of the SaaS: account, credits, Supabase, Modal, Stripe and security.

supabase.title: Supabase
supabase.detail: Auth, Postgres RLS and the private `videos` bucket are the source of truth.

modal.title: Modal + FFmpeg
modal.detail: Heavy renders run off Vercel through a secure Modal endpoint.

security.title: MVP security
security.detail: RLS enabled, Storage scoped per user folder, credits and Stripe written by the service role.

list.empty_description: Create a new project to get started.

new.label: New project
new.title: Turn footage into ad variants
new.subtitle: Direct upload to Supabase Storage, project creation in the database, then Modal trigger if enabled. Vercel never renders the video.

upload.title: Source video
upload.hint: MP4, MOV or WebM. Private Supabase storage.

new.instructions_placeholder: E.g. test a benefit angle, a social proof angle and an urgency angle.

chatbot.subtitle: AI assistant
chatbot.prompt_placeholder: Ask the AI assistant to edit your video...
chatbot.preset_empty_description: Create a preset to save your favorite prompts for quick access.
chatbot.preset_dialog_create_description: Save a custom prompt as a preset to reuse it later. Useful for tasks that you do frequently.
chatbot.preset_dialog_update_description: Adjust this preset and save your changes for all projects in this browser.
chatbot.preset_field_prompt_placeholder: e.g., Remove all silences longer than 2 seconds, then add b-roll footage of nature scenes every 15 seconds...
chatbot.empty_state: Start a conversation with the AI assistant.
